paragraphs: Create an inviting setting for memories and cozy moments with a classic wood-burning fireplace from Heat & Glo.

Craving the look, sound and smell of a wood-burning fire? Our collection of wood-fueled fireplaces offers the rustic charm of wood-burning, with a wide range of sizes and styles, at price points you’ll love.
Set the stage for memorable moments and expand your livable space with an outdoor wood-burning fireplace from Heat & Glo.

images.alt: Heat & Glo Rutherford wood-burning fireplace in living room with white surround and mantel.
Heat & Glo Castlewood outdoor wood fireplace in covered patio with seating area next to swimming pool.
